name: High Blue Wellness Center
description: Come play pickleball at High Blue Wellness Center in Belton, MO! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Members only — Members play for free.

name: Memorial Park Tennis Courts By Raymore Elementary
description: Memorial Park Tennis Courts By Raymore Elementary is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Raymore, MO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Peculiar pickleball courts
description: Peculiar pickleball courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Peculiar, MO. There are 2 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Raymore Recreation Park
description: Raymore Recreation Park is a place to play pickleball in Raymore, MO. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.
